title: jasione humilis var. campestris
intro: Jasione humilis var. campestris, also known as the small bluebells or alpine bellflower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Jasione humilis var. campestris include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as a diuretic to help with urinary issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
